payload.title: Local 'Add a board' modal: attach-local OR connect-to-remote in one place
payload.description: The current 'Attach a workspace' modal (local .scope path + label) should become a unified add-a-board entry with two paths: (1) attach a local .scope/ directory, (2) connect to a hosted project (hub URL + key -> pick or create a project). Connect currently lives as a separate CTA; surface it on this screen too.
